title: FinTech Consultant\ Presales
description:
Responsibilities:

- Provide pre-sales support with technical solution, implementation and support services efforts and agreements;

- Prepare solution proposals, proof of concept and solution / service demonstration;

- Architect and design solutions based on client’s requirements and applying industry best practices to meet customer goals and objectives;

- Liaise with management, functional, subject matter experts and development teams (internal and external) for end-to-end project implementation;

- Develop strong working relationships with clients and ensure positive client feedback;

- Adhere to the company’s project management and governance framework.


Requirements:

- Bachelor’s Degree (or higher) in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or related field;

- At least 5 years working experience as a business analyst or consultant role;

- Good Understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC);

- Java and SQL knowledge;

- Excellent communication skills, able to articulate and drive discussion across business functions and stakeholders;

- Excellent problem solving and user support skills;

- Experience in Banking, Financial services or Wealth Management Domain is strongly regarded.

Salary and Benefits:

- Competitive salary with generous annual performance-based bonuses

- Comprehensive benefits package including health and wellness benefits

- Generous annual leave package and additional paid leaves for work-life balance

- Great company culture with friendly team members

Learning and Development:

- Accelerate your expertise in FinTech & Banking

- Opportunities for career advancement and professional development

- Exposure to cutting-edge technologies and innovative projects

We offer competitive remuneration, comprehensive fringe benefits, international exposure, promising career prospect, training in the technology and business domain, and opportunities to work with global top-tier financial institutions. Interested parties, please submit your CV to hr@axisoft.com.

Your application and personal information will be treated as strictly confidential and used only for purposes of recruitment and selection.

postedCompany.description:
Axisoft is a top-notch financial technology provider with offices in China (Hong Kong, Shanghai, Zhuhai, and Shenzhen) and Singapore.  Since 1998, we have been helping global top-tier private banks improve their profitability through the deployment of our solutions in several countries and regions, such as China (including Hong Kong and Taiwan), Singapore, Australia, Japan, and Switzerland.


In addition, we have been providing professional services of core banking systems to top-tier private banks in Asia. Our professional services help Financial Institutions implement, maintain and enhance their core banking systems. Throughout the years of experience in the core banking systems, we have established a professional team with solid experience and knowledge in core banking domain.


Following are the awards and certificates we received. 

• Hong Kong ICT Best FinTech Award

• Hong Kong ICT Best Innovation & Research Award

• Asian Private Banker - Most Innovative Solution for the Technology Award

• Asian Private Banker - Top Private Banking Technology Providers in Asia

• China National Hi-Tech Enterprise 

• CMMI Level 3 Certificate


If you are a talented professional and desire the excitement of creating Financial Technology, software and solutions that will affect millions seriously, consider Axisoft as we are a place to make a difference. We offer competitive remuneration, comprehensive fringe benefits, international exposure, promising career prospect and opportunities to work in global top-tier financial institutions. 


For further information about Axisoft, visit www.axisoft.com.
postedCompany.name: AXISOFT (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.
